name: Domain Locker
description: An all-in-one tool for keeping track of your domain name portfolio
compose:
name: slashnode-domain-locker
services:
  app:
    image: lissy93/domain-locker:0.1.4
    container_name: domain-locker-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    environment:
      DL_ENV_TYPE: selfHosted
      DL_PG_HOST: domain-locker-postgres
      DL_PG_PORT: '5432'
      DL_PG_USER: postgres
      DL_PG_PASSWORD: domain-locker
      DL_PG_NAME: domain_locker
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8839:3000
  postgres:
    image: postgres:17.4
    container_name: domain-locker-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
      POSTGRES_DB: domain_locker
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: domain-locker
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-db_data:/var/lib/postgresql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  postgres_data-db_data:
    name: slashnode-domain-locker_postgres_data-db_data
